evals.prompt:
当前设计状态：

problem: 构建用户通知服务
scope: 发送系统通知

 design_target_type: system
design_tree:
  - 通知调度器: 负责触发通知的发送（待细化）
  - 渠道适配层: 对接各渠道 SDK（待细化）
  - 模板引擎: 渲染通知内容（待细化）
open_branches: [通知调度器, 渠道适配层, 模板引擎]

请细化“通知调度器”这个分支。
evals.expected_output: The skill should refine the branch using the system completion standard: responsibility, non-responsibility, adjacent interaction, failure, and validation.

assertions.name: uses_system_leaf_standard
assertions.description: The refined branch answers the system-type completion questions

evals.prompt:
当前设计状态：

problem: 建立事故复盘流程
scope: 从事故确认到复盘关闭
design_target_type: workflow
design_tree:
  - 事故确认阶段: 目标和输入输出待细化
  - 原因分析阶段: 责任人和质量门待细化
  - 行动项关闭阶段: 回退规则待细化
open_branches: [事故确认阶段, 原因分析阶段, 行动项关闭阶段]

请细化“原因分析阶段”。
evals.expected_output: The skill should refine the branch using the workflow completion standard: stage goal, input/output, owner, rollback path, and quality gate.

assertions.name: uses_workflow_leaf_standard
assertions.description: The refined branch answers the workflow-type completion questions

evals.prompt:
当前设计状态：

problem: 建立代码研究方法论
scope: 决定如何抽样、何时停机、何时回退
design_target_type: methodology
design_tree:
  - 适用条件: 需要补齐
  - 停机准则: 需要细化
  - 交接形式: 需要细化
open_branches: [适用条件, 停机准则, 交接形式]

请细化“停机准则”。
evals.expected_output: The skill should refine the branch using the methodology completion standard rather than forcing system-style interfaces.

assertions.name: uses_methodology_leaf_standard
assertions.description: The refined branch answers applicability, decision rule, handoff, and exit-condition style questions

evals.prompt:
当前设计状态：

problem: 设计多技能路由框架
scope: 按任务类型和风险级别路由到不同 skill
design_target_type: framework
design_tree:
  - 路由维度: 需要细化
  - handoff 形式: 需要细化
  - 退出条件: 需要细化
open_branches: [路由维度, handoff 形式, 退出条件]

请细化“路由维度”。
evals.expected_output: The skill should refine the branch using the framework completion standard around dimensions, routing rules, non-ownership, handoff, and completion conditions.

assertions.name: uses_framework_leaf_standard
assertions.description: The refined branch answers framework-style completion questions

evals.prompt:
当前设计状态：

problem: 实现一个支持多种数据源的 ETL 管道
design_tree:
  - 数据源适配器: 从 MySQL、Postgres、CSV 读取数据
  - 转换引擎: 执行字段映射、过滤、聚合
  - 数据写入层: 将处理后数据写入目标存储
open_branches: [数据源适配器, 转换引擎]

请细化“转换引擎”。
evals.expected_output: The skill should refuse to continue refinement because design_target_type is missing, and it should hand back to design-orchestrator or design-structure instead of assuming system.

assertions.name: blocks_missing_target_type
assertions.description: Output treats the missing design_target_type as a blocker
